content.description: Federation error log viewer for all ADFS servers. Categorizes authentication errors by type and application, covering both datacenter sites (site-a and site-b).
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS: Event Logs</label>
    <description>Federation error log viewer for all ADFS servers. Categorizes authentication errors by type and application, covering both datacenter sites (site-a and site-b).</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "ADFS: Event Logs",
	"description": "Federation error log viewer for all ADFS servers. Categorizes authentication errors by type and application, covering both datacenter sites (site-a and site-b).",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Global Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_W9UBJcT7": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_yNc24oxB"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 50,
				"dataOverlayMode": "none",
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showInternalFields": false,
				"showRowNumbers": false
			},
			"title": "TABLE",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_ixY1lxIL": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_vPnu1Ohy_ds_yNc24oxB"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 50,
				"dataOverlayMode": "none",
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showInternalFields": false,
				"showRowNumbers": false
			},
			"title": "STATS",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_total_errors": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Total Errors",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_total_errors"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_unique_rps": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Unique Relying Parties Affected",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_unique_rps"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_top_error": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Top Error Type",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_top_error"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_site_kpi": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Errors by Site (site-a vs site-b)",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_site_kpi"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_error_cat_pie": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Error Category Distribution",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_error_cat_pie"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_top_rp_pie": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Top 10 Relying Parties by Errors",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_top_rp_pie"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_timeline": {
			"type": "splunk.line",
			"title": "Error Timeline by Category",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_timeline"
			},
			"options": {
				"lineWidth": 2,
				"nullValueDisplay": "zero",
				"legendDisplay": "right",
				"legendMode": "standard",
				"xAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"yAxisScale": "linear",
				"dataValuesDisplay": "off",
				"showSplitSeries": false
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_vPnu1Ohy_ds_yNc24oxB": {
			"name": "Table search copy 1",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| rex \"Relying Party:\\s*(?<relying_party>[^\\n]+)\"\n| rex \"Exception details:\\s*(?<exception_details>[^\\n]+)\"\n| eval error_category = case(\n    match(_raw, \"user name or password is incorrect\"), \"Credential Failure\",\n    match(_raw, \"SecurityTokenValidationException\"), \"Token Validation Failure\",\n    match(_raw, \"AuthenticationFailedException\"), \"Authentication Failed Exception\",\n    match(_raw, \"password expired\"), \"Password Expired\",\n    match(_raw, \"The user is not authorized\"), \"Authorization Failure\",\n    1=1, \"Other\"\n)\n| eval site = case(\n    match(upper(host), \"^(A|P)-ESS-SEN-ADF5\"), \"site-a\",\n    match(upper(host), \"^S-ESS-SEN-(SSO1|SSO2)\"), \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| stats count by error_category, relying_party, host, site, EventCode\n| sort -count",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_yNc24oxB": {
			"name": "Table search",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| rex field=_raw \"(?m)^Relying Party:\\s*(?<relying_party>.+)$\"\n| rex field=_raw \"(?m)^Exception details:\\s*(?<exception_details>.+)$\"\n| eval relying_party=trim(relying_party), exception_details=trim(exception_details)\n| eval error_category=case(\n    like(_raw,\"%user name or password is incorrect%\"),\"Credential Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%SecurityTokenValidationException%\"),\"Token Validation Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%AuthenticationFailedException%\"),\"Authentication Failed Exception\",\n    like(_raw,\"%password expired%\"),\"Password Expired\",\n    like(_raw,\"%The user is not authorized%\"),\"Authorization Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%MSIS7054: The SAML logout did not complete properly%\"),\"SAML Logout Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%POLICY0017: Attribute store%\"),\"Attribute Store Misconfiguration\",\n    like(_raw,\"%MSIS5007: The caller authorization failed%\"),\"Caller Authorization Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%InvalidAuthenticationTypePolicyException%\"),\"Invalid AuthN Type Policy\",\n    1=1,\"Other\"\n)\n| eval site = case(\n    match(upper(host), \"^(A|P)-ESS-SEN-ADF5\"), \"site-a\",\n    match(upper(host), \"^S-ESS-SEN-(SSO1|SSO2)\"), \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly\n| eval rp_display=coalesce(rp_friendly, relying_party)\n| eval event_time=strftime(_time,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\")\n| table event_time error_category rp_display relying_party host site EventCode\n| sort 0 -event_time",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_total_errors": {
			"name": "Total errors",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| stats count as \"Total Errors\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_unique_rps": {
			"name": "Unique relying parties",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| rex field=_raw \"(?m)^Relying Party:\\s*(?<relying_party>.+)$\"\n| eval relying_party = trim(relying_party)\n| stats dc(relying_party) as \"Unique Relying Parties\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_top_error": {
			"name": "Top error category",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| eval error_category=case(\n    like(_raw,\"%user name or password is incorrect%\"),\"Credential Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%SecurityTokenValidationException%\"),\"Token Validation Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%AuthenticationFailedException%\"),\"Authentication Failed Exception\",\n    like(_raw,\"%password expired%\"),\"Password Expired\",\n    like(_raw,\"%The user is not authorized%\"),\"Authorization Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%MSIS7054%\"),\"SAML Logout Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%POLICY0017%\"),\"Attribute Store Misconfiguration\",\n    like(_raw,\"%MSIS5007%\"),\"Caller Authorization Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%InvalidAuthenticationTypePolicyException%\"),\"Invalid AuthN Type Policy\",\n    1=1,\"Other\")\n| stats count by error_category\n| sort - count\n| head 1\n| eval \"Top Error\" = error_category . \" | \" . count\n| fields \"Top Error\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_site_kpi": {
			"name": "Site KPI",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| eval site = case(\n    match(upper(host), \"^(A|P)-ESS-SEN-ADF5\"), \"site-a\",\n    match(upper(host), \"^S-ESS-SEN-(SSO1|SSO2)\"), \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| stats count by site",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_error_cat_pie": {
			"name": "Error category distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| eval error_category=case(\n    like(_raw,\"%user name or password is incorrect%\"),\"Credential Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%SecurityTokenValidationException%\"),\"Token Validation Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%AuthenticationFailedException%\"),\"Authentication Failed Exception\",\n    like(_raw,\"%password expired%\"),\"Password Expired\",\n    like(_raw,\"%The user is not authorized%\"),\"Authorization Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%MSIS7054%\"),\"SAML Logout Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%POLICY0017%\"),\"Attribute Store Misconfiguration\",\n    like(_raw,\"%MSIS5007%\"),\"Caller Authorization Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%InvalidAuthenticationTypePolicyException%\"),\"Invalid AuthN Type Policy\",\n    1=1,\"Other\")\n| stats count by error_category\n| sort - count",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_top_rp_pie": {
			"name": "Top relying parties by errors",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| rex field=_raw \"(?m)^Relying Party:\\s*(?<relying_party>.+)$\"\n| eval relying_party = trim(relying_party)\n| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly\n| eval rp_display = coalesce(rp_friendly, relying_party)\n| stats count by rp_display\n| sort - count\n| head 10",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_timeline": {
			"name": "Error timeline",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) \"Encountered error during federation passive request.\"\n| eval error_category=case(\n    like(_raw,\"%user name or password is incorrect%\"),\"Credential Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%SecurityTokenValidationException%\"),\"Token Validation Failure\",\n    like(_raw,\"%AuthenticationFailedException%\"),\"Auth Failed\",\n    like(_raw,\"%password expired%\"),\"Password Expired\",\n    like(_raw,\"%The user is not authorized%\"),\"Authorization Failure\",\n    1=1,\"Other\")\n| timechart span=1h count by error_category limit=5",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		}
	},
	"layout": {
		"globalInputs": [
			"input_global_trp"
		],
		"layoutDefinitions": {
			"layout_1": {
				"options": {
					"display": "auto",
					"height": 1400,
					"width": 2100
				},
				"structure": [
					{
						"item": "viz_total_errors",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 0,
							"w": 525,
							"h": 100
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_unique_rps",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 525,
							"y": 0,
							"w": 525,
							"h": 100
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_top_error",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 1050,
							"y": 0,
							"w": 1050,
							"h": 100
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_timeline",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 110,
							"w": 2100,
							"h": 220
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_error_cat_pie",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 340,
							"w": 700,
							"h": 260
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_top_rp_pie",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 700,
							"y": 340,
							"w": 700,
							"h": 260
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_site_kpi",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 1400,
							"y": 340,
							"w": 700,
							"h": 260
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_W9UBJcT7",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 610,
							"w": 2100,
							"h": 390
						}
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_ixY1lxIL",
						"type": "block",
						"position": {
							"x": 0,
							"y": 1010,
							"w": 2100,
							"h": 390
						}
					}
				],
				"type": "absolute"
			}
		},
		"options": {},
		"tabs": {
			"items": [
				{
					"label": "New tab",
					"layoutId": "layout_1"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}
    ]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: ADFS: Event Logs
